name: Mojeek
description: An independent search engine with its own crawler, focusing on privacy and indexing over 1 billion pages.
longDescription: Mojeek, established in 2004 in London, UK, is a rare independent search engine that builds its own index, having crawled over 6 billion pages. Unlike many competitors, it doesn’t rely on third-party results, offering a unique, privacy-focused alternative. Mojeek avoids collecting IP addresses, click data, or search histories, appealing to users wary of Big Tech. Based in the UK, it’s grown steadily as a niche player with a commitment to transparency and autonomy in search technology.
